channel.title: YOLOv8 on Ruchita Vehale
channel.description: Recent content in YOLOv8 on Ruchita Vehale

item.title: Dynamic Visual SLAM with YOLOv8 + DeepSORT + MiDaS
item.description: Real-time SLAM that filters dynamic objects to prevent map corruption, enabling reliable localisation in environments with people and vehicles.

item.title: Hybrid Apple Detection: YOLOv8 vs Traditional CV
item.description: Deep learning benchmark study: YOLOv8 trained for 1,500 epochs against traditional CV methods. Published in SSRN Electronic Journal.
